name: career-os
description: CareerOS is a single-user job application operating system for tracking companies, applications, resume versions, job descriptions, contacts, interviews, reminders, and analytics.

scripts.dev: docker compose up -d postgres redis && dotenv -e .env -- go run ./backend/cmd/migrate up && dotenv -e .env -- concurrently --names "api,worker,web" --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow,magenta" "go run ./backend/cmd/api" "go run ./backend/cmd/worker" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
